---
title: "projFLC-revised-overlays"
output: html_document
date: "2023-08-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r load-libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
harmonized.seurat <- readRDS("./revisedDataset/rds/FLCvNML_Named-obj.rds")
```

```{r set seed and project name, warning=F, message=F}
set.seed(1234)
proj_name <- "FLCvNML"
```

```{r}
dir.create("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/celTypeMarkers")

for (gene in c("EPCAM", "PKHD1", "FGFR2", "TYROBP", "SRGN", "C1QB", "FYN", "NOSTRIN", "PTPRB", "LDB2","CTGF", "ACTA2", "CALD1", "NPPB","CYP3A4", "RPS21","RPL4","S100A4","CFL1","TMSB4X","B2M","ACTG1","EEF1B2","COX7C","HNRNPA1","PARP8","MALAT1","CST7","COX4I1","ID2","ARHGAP15","CELF2","PTPRC","RPS27","UQCRB","RPS3","PPIA","TMSB10","FYN")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, label.size = 3, label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.7, repel = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/celTypeMarkers/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
for (gene in c("HNF4")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, label.size = 3, label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.7, repel = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/celTypeMarkers/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("VCAN", "SLC16A14", "GLI1", "GLI2", "GLI3", "BAG2", "STIP1", "OAT", "OTC", "LDHB", "SDS", "GLS", "ALDH18A1", "PYCR1", "PYCR2", "PRODH", "P4HA2", "CXCR4", "CXCL12", "SOX17", "GLS", "PDGFB", "PDGFRB", "WNT4", "FZD10", "VEGFA", "TGFB3", "TGFBR2", "TGFBR1", "KDR", "FLT1", "CTLA4", "GRAMD1B", "STIM1", "PKD2", "TMCO1", "SLC27A4", "ACSL5", "SLC27A3", "SLC27A2", "SLC27A1", "ACSL6", "CD36", "SLC16A7","SLC16A1", "LDHA", "SLC2A2", "HK2", "GCK", "PFKFB1", "PFKFB2", "G6PD", "TKT", "BPGM", "MINPP1", "ALDOA", "ALDOB", "ALDOC", "PFKP", "PFKL", "PFKM", "PKM", "PKLR", "SLC37A4", "PGK1", "ENO3", "KHK", "GK", "AKR1B1", "GPAM", "GPD1", "GPD1L", "GPD2", "ACLY", "IDH1", "ELOVL5", "BCAT1",  "PTPRB", "NPPB",  "CYP3A4", "FYN", "EPCAM", "PKHD1", "FGFR2", "TYROBP", "SRGN", "C1QB", "NOSTRIN", "PTPRB", "LDB2", "ACTA2", "CALD1", "HNF4A", "ENO3", "KHK", "GK", "AKR1B1", "GPAM", "GPD1", "GPD1L", "GPD2", "ACLY", "IDH1", "ELOVL5", "BCAT1",  "PTPRB", "NPPB",  "CYP3A4", "FYN", "EPCAM", "PKHD1", "FGFR2", "TYROBP", "SRGN", "C1QB", "NOSTRIN", "PTPRB", "LDB2", "ACTA2", "CALD1", "HNF4A", "CXCR4", "CXCL12", "PDGFA", "PDGFRA", "AGT", "AGTR1", "CXCL16", "CXCR6", "LOX", "ERBB2")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, split.by = "status", label.size = 3, label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.7, repel = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 600)
}
```


```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "RNA"
for (gene in c("CXCR4", "CXCL12")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-RNA-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("PDGFA", "PDGFRA", "AGT", "AGTR1")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.5, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE, repel = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("CXCL16", "CXCR6")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("LOX")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE,
              repel = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("ERBB2")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE,
              repel = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("KLF15")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE,
              repel = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("KLF15")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE,
              repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("POSTN", "CALCR")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE,
              repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("GDF15")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE,
              repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("DNM1L", "OPA1", "MFN1", "MFN2")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE,
              repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```



```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("FGF7", "CALCR", "CALCA", "CALCRL", "CTGF")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE,
              repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("SLC16A14", "VCAN", "HSPB1", "TNRC6C")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE, label.size = 7, repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("GDF15", "GFRAL")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("SLC16A14", "VCAN")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE, label.size = 7, repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("OAT", "IRF4", "CA12")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = TRUE, label.size = 7, repel = TRUE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("SOX2", "NANOG", "POU5F1", "BACE2", "KIF26B", "KRT7", "BMI1", "AGR2", "PCSK1", "TESC", "TMEM163")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "RNA"
for (gene in c("SOX2", "NANOG", "POU5F1", "BACE2", "KIF26B", "KRT7", "BMI1", "AGR2", "PCSK1", "TESC", "TMEM163")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-RNA-named.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("VCAN")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-unnamed.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("VCAN", "SLC16A14", "CCN2")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-unnamed.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("PTPRB", "PAEP", "AC093515.1", "AGR2", "MYH4", "CGA", "NTS", "SOX11", "APOA4", "ECEL1", "S100P", "AC114757.1", "CYP17A1", "KCNQ3", "C1QL1", "MUC13", "GUCA2B", "ERVH-1", "UGT2B11", "AC112770.1", "AC108517.1", "PCSK1", "AC103718.1", "LYPD1", "HAPLN1", "CA9", "RNF182", "AL391845.2", "LINC01419", "HOXD10", "AC241644.2", "CDH17", "EDIL3", "MMP1", "REG1A", "HOXD1", "AC080132.1", "LEF1", "FOXQ1", "FAM83A-AS1", "PLAU", "AC018767.2", "PGF", "SPX", "INSL4", "AC113383.1", "UNC5D", "ZNF385D-AS2", "AL136372.2", "MTRNR2L1", "PRND", "PART1", "SFRP2", "CA12", "AC093607.1", "UCN", "PLA2G2A", "MEOX2", "SPINK1", "AC006019.3", "PIK3R6", "TNFRSF4", "HIST1H1C")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-unnamed.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("CD68")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-unnamed.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("NTS", "PAEP", "CGA", "UGT2B11", "AGR2", "ECEL1", "CA12", "AC093607.1", "CA9", "LINC00499", "MUC13", "PART1", "MYH4", "FOXQ1", "MUC5B", "AC112770.1", "APOA4", "LYPD1", "MUC13", "CDH17", "PLAC4", "C1QL1", "TRIM31", "KCNK9", "S100P", "MUC5B", "REG1A", "PCSK1", "KCNK9", "PAK3", "POSTN", "NRG2", "NRSN1", "CYP17A1", "CDH11")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-unnamed.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("SOX17")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-unnamed.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(harmonized.seurat) <- "SCT"
for (gene in c("ACTA2", "LOXL1")) {
  FeaturePlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, pt.size = 0.2, split.by = "status", ncol = 4, label = FALSE, order = TRUE)
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/UMAPs/UMAPoverlays/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-featurePlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-unnamed.png"), units = "in", width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 600)
}
```

```{r}
for (gene in c("VCAN", "SLC16A14", "PDE10A","TAFA5", "TMEM163", "OAT", "CA12", "BACE2", "COL4A1",
    "FAM167A", "GPRIN3", "IRF4", "KIF26B", "TESC",
    "CD68", # Ross, H. M.et al.Fibrolamellar carcinomas are positive for CD68.Mod. Pathol.24,390–395 (2011)
    "SOX9", "SOX17", "PDX1", "POU5F1", "SALL4", "SHH", "NANOG", "KLF4", "SOX2", "BMI1", # Oikawa 2015
    "AGR2", #Wang, Z., Hao, Y. & Lowe, A. W. The adenocarcinoma-associated antigen,AGR2, promotes tumor growth, cell migration, and cellular transformation.Cancer Res.68,492–497  
    "PCSK1", #Malouf, G. G.et al.Transcriptional profiling of pure fibrolamellarhepatocellular carcinoma reveals an endocrine signature.Hepatology59,2228–2237
    "KRT7", # Malouf G, Falissard B, Azoulay D, et al. Is histological diagnosis ofprimary liver carcinomas withfibrous stroma reproducibleamong experts? J Clin Pathol 2009;62(06):519–5248Abdul-Al HM, Wang G, Makhlouf HR, Goodman ZD. Fibrolamellarhepatocellular carcinoma: an immunohistochemical comparisonwith conventional hepatocellular carcinoma. Int J Surg Pathol2010;18(05):313–318
    "TCN1", # D. L. Lildballe, K. Q. T. Nguyen, S. S. Poulsen, H. O. Nielsen,and E. Nexo, “Haptocorrin as marker of disease progressionin �brolamellar hepatocellular carcinoma,”European Journal ofSurgical Oncology
    "PRKACA", "DNAJB1",
    "CCN2")) {
  VlnPlot(harmonized.seurat, features = gene, split.by = "status")
  ggsave(paste0("./revisedDataset/violinPlots/", proj_name, "_", gene, "-violinPlot-integrated-byStatus-SCT-named.png"), units = "in", width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)
}
```
